name: Ben

quest_summary: Chaem is an athlete in training who dreams of entering a national volleyball competition one day. She works part time as a lifeguard.

name: Charles

name: Leah

name: Lily

name: Luke

name: Macy

name: Nina

name: Noah

name: Pablo

name: Rafael

name: Raj

name: Surya

name: Wakuu

name: Yuri

name: Zarah

name: Antonio

name: Betty

name: Bree

name: Connor

name: Dinda
loved_gifts: Fresh salad, Melon, Flower bouquet, Pearl

name: Eddy

name: Jack

name: Kira
